rationale: Both reviews identify the undocumented `change` in `comul_includeRight`, but Review 1 also targets the genuinely fragile unfolding-heavy `simpa` subproofs in `antipode_comp` that are visible in the diff. Review 2 adds several broader complaints about the `let` coercion alignment and standard tensor-product induction/simp proofs that look more like churn than material proof-quality fixes.
